MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. Motion To Deem Requests For Admissions Admitted

The unopposed motion is granted. The Requests for Admission are deemed admitted.

The prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the court's ruling and must e-mail it to the Judge Pro Tem Tom Cohen at tom@thomascohen.com.
